title: aster illyricus
intro: Aster illyricus, also known as the Illyrian Aster, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the daisy family (Asteraceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis, coughs, and colds, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant is also known for its health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and even acting as an antiseptic. Aster illyricus is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
